results.title: What I *actually* do as a Product Manager (in 2023)
results.reason: Highly relatable 'day-in-the-life' style that excels at explaining the 'what' and 'why' of the role for absolute newcomers.
summary: Learn how a manager spends their daily work hours
Understand how to talk with different team members
Discover the real tasks beyond just planning products
See what it takes to succeed in this role

results.title: Introduction to Product Management | What is Product Management ? | Great Learning
results.reason: The massive duration ensures comprehensive coverage of the entire PM lifecycle, making it a one-stop-shop for serious beginners.
summary: Learn the basic steps for building new products
Understand how to solve problems for your customers
Discover how to lead a team toward one goal
Study the full life cycle of a successful product

results.title: What do product managers do? - Agile Coach
results.reason: Produced by Atlassian, this offers the most professional, high-level conceptual clarity for someone who knows nothing about the field.
summary: Learn why this role connects business and technology
Understand how to prioritize the most important features
Discover how to balance customer needs and goals
See how teams work together to build software

results.title: The Art of Product Management with Sachin Rekhi (ENG’05 W’05)
results.reason: Academic yet practical depth from a Wharton lecture that explains the 'Art' and nuance behind PM decision-making.
summary: Learn the creative side of designing great products
Understand how to find the best market opportunities
Discover ways to measure if a product is working
Hear expert advice on building a long-term career

results.title: 15 Product Management Terms and Concepts Everyone In Tech Should Know
results.reason: Excellent for beginners to learn the 'language' of tech, providing immediate utility through vocabulary and concepts.
summary: Learn the common words used in tech offices
Understand basic ideas for tracking product growth
Discover how teams organize their daily work tasks
Feel more confident talking with engineers and designers
